case_title: NAZARENO HILARIO VIEIRA FILHO VS. KYI WUT KHUN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILHO, NAZARENO HILARIO VIEIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHUN, KYI WUT DBA BE BE CLEANERS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY FILHO, NAZARENO HILARIO VIEIRA AS TO DEFENDANT KHUN, KYI WUT DBA BE BE CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF NAZARENO HILARIO VIEIRA FILHO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KYI WUT KHUN IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY REBECCA CHAU, CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED APR-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KHUN, KYI WUT DBA BE BE CLEANERS
